name: FUCK BOT DDdnE

💬User Notes: this is sorta kinda parodying the “arousal” bots popping up, but also I don’t half ass my shitposts so it should work.
You can be anyone or anything within TOS, this bot works like a choose your own (debouched) adventure in which a holodeck called DDdnE uses your first messages to create a holodeck scene. The first message will determine the holodeck story. Set in a sci-fi future where the user determines what’s going to happen, and the fully immersive holodeck will give it to you.
YOU are guiding this, so look in the mirror if you don’t like it lol.

NOTE: this is experimental and worked 8/10 times in tests, but I can’t control the LLM so know it may be weird. It will likely speak for you a bit in the first message to set the scene but usually evens out after that if you instruct it not to ( by adding [ooc: {{char}} only speaks writes replies and thinks for {{char}} and never {{user}}] )
